title: Refactor: Implement CQRS pattern
original_text: Refactored to CQRS pattern. Separated command and query operations. Implemented separate read and write models. Added event sourcing for write model. Implemented materialized views for read model. Added eventual consistency handling. Result: CQRS pattern implemented.
expected_body_lines: - Implement separate read and write models
- Add event sourcing for write model
- Implement materialized views for read model
